name: ai-native-founder-playbook-skill
description: Agent Skill for applying AI-native startup stage gates, MVP planning, PMF diagnostics, launch operations, and scale-stage moat workflows.

scripts.test: node scripts/validate-skill.mjs && node ai-native-founder-playbook/scripts/stage-checklist.mjs idea && node ai-native-founder-playbook/scripts/stage-checklist.mjs mvp && node ai-native-founder-playbook/scripts/stage-checklist.mjs launch && node ai-native-founder-playbook/scripts/stage-checklist.mjs scale
